seeds.transformation_rationale: All 7 features are morphological measurements of wheat kernels, naturally grouped as kernel morphology measurements

thyroid.transformation_rationale: All 6 features are thyroid-related laboratory measurements, naturally grouped as thyroid function tests

pima.transformation_rationale: Eight clinical metrics divided into 4 physiological pairs, each pair representing related health measurements

ionosphere.semantic_grouping: Radar signals with in-phase and quadrature components
ionosphere.transformation_rationale: 34 radar returns naturally pair into 17 pulse returns with in-phase and quadrature components

spectf.transformation_rationale: 22 regions of interest with perfusion measurements, representing heart regions

glass.semantic_grouping: Major vs trace oxides in ceramic composition
glass.transformation_rationale: Chemical composition features grouped into major and trace oxides, creating a chemistry matrix
